series_metadata.series_title: Private Investigator Security Guard (PISG) Licensee Status Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Record series includes Insurance Acords (required proof of insurance for the company); Termination Reports (required when a company terminates an employee); and Quarterly Reports (required list of registrants employed by the licensee).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in PISGS office files for the current quarter, plus two years after date of receipt. ; Electronic: Retain in PISGS office files for the current quarter, plus two years after date of receipt., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
